description: Refocus TokCard around three core questions: how many tokens you used, what project you are building, and where you rank. Simplify the editor, tighten AI copy, curate visuals, and make ranking and project identity much clearer.

userStories.title: Add primary project identity to card data
userStories.description: As a creator, I need one primary project name, URL, and one-line pitch to travel with the card, share page, and ranking views.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend CardData with primary project name, primary project URL, and primary project pitch
Persist the new fields through share payload encoding/decoding, template preset encoding/decoding, and saved card payloads
Existing shared/template links without the new fields still decode safely with empty defaults
Keep the existing projects array for secondary links without breaking current behavior
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Restructure the editor around core information
userStories.description: As a new user, I want the create page to show only the core card inputs first so I can finish a card without getting lost in settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Show only total tokens, primary project name, primary project URL, and primary project pitch in the default above-the-fold editor area
Move avatar, theme, background, metaphor, secondary projects, and trust controls into a collapsed advanced personalization section
Keep advanced personalization collapsed by default on first load
Update the preview immediately when any core field changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Generate a one-line project pitch with AI
userStories.description: As a creator, I want TokCard to generate a short, impressive one-line intro for my project from its URL or name.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an AI generate action next to the primary project pitch field
Use project URL metadata as prompt context when available and fall back to the project name when metadata cannot be fetched
Return exactly 3 candidate pitches per generation
Keep each Chinese pitch at 24 characters or fewer and each English pitch at 12 words or fewer
Generated pitches emphasize user value, speed, scale, ambition, or results instead of generic filler
Allow users to apply one candidate, regenerate, or manually edit the final pitch
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Tighten AI slogan, metaphor, and caption output
userStories.description: As a user, I want AI-generated slogans, metaphors, and viral copy to be short, punchy, and immediately usable.
acceptanceCriteria: Limit slogan generation to 3 candidates per request
Keep each Chinese slogan at 12 characters or fewer and each English slogan at 15 words or fewer
Limit metaphor generation to 3 candidates per request and keep each Chinese metaphor at 18 characters or fewer
Keep viral caption output compact with a short title, a short body, and no more than 2 hashtags
Use total tokens, primary project name, primary project pitch, and ranking signal as prompt context for AI copy generation
Reduce repetitive or template-like output across generated results
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Reduce card presets to four curated templates
userStories.description: As a user, I want fewer but clearer card presets so I can choose a style quickly without decision fatigue.
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce the visible CARD_PRESETS list to exactly 4 curated presets
Cover these 4 use cases with the curated presets: token flex, project launch, professional profile, and social sharing
Update preset names and descriptions so each preset clearly communicates when to use it
Ensure each preset defaults reinforce token usage, project identity, and ranking rather than extra decoration
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace busy backgrounds with curated color swatches
userStories.description: As a user, I want the visual system to feel premium and calm, with curated solid and gradient backgrounds instead of busy images.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace the current image-based preset backgrounds with exactly 8 curated solid or gradient swatches
Do not surface custom image background upload in the default creator flow
Reduce the visible theme selector to exactly 5 curated themes
Give each visible background and theme a human-friendly label
Ensure all curated theme/background combinations keep text readable in preview
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Reorder card and share page around token, project, and rank
userStories.description: As a viewer, I want every TokCard and shared page to immediately tell me the token number, the main project, and the ranking signal in that order.
acceptanceCriteria: Make total token usage the strongest visual element in CardRenderer
Show primary project name and primary project pitch directly on the card or its immediate summary area without requiring an extra click
Show rank, percentile, or tier signal as the third layer of emphasis after token and project
Keep secondary project links visible but visually lower priority than the main project identity
Update SharedCardLanding summaries and primary actions to follow the same token -> project -> rank order
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show my ranking summary after create and on share page
userStories.description: As a creator, I want quick feedback on where I rank so I can compare myself and jump into the leaderboard.
acceptanceCriteria: For rank-eligible cards, show a ranking summary after export/share in the create flow
Include at least one of: global rank or percentile, plus the current rank tier
Add a CTA that opens the leaderboard focused on the current card when a card id exists
Keep the share page ranking summary visible without forcing the user to search again
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Turn the leaderboard into a project discovery view
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the leaderboard to show what top builders are making, not just how many tokens they used.
acceptanceCriteria: Display rank, username, total tokens, primary project name, primary project pitch, and channel/model badge in leaderboard rows
Make the focused user more visually obvious when the page is opened with a focus query parameter
Highlight top performers or comparison targets without hiding the main ranked list
Reduce the visual prominence of secondary filters so the ranked rows remain the page focus
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align the homepage and navigation to the core triad
userStories.description: As a first-time visitor, I want the homepage and nav to clearly explain that TokCard is for showing token usage, project identity, and ranking.
acceptanceCriteria: Update homepage headline and support copy to clearly express token usage, project identity, and ranking
Keep create-card as the primary CTA and leaderboard as the secondary CTA
Ensure showcase cards and feature blocks reinforce the same three-value story
Simplify navigation so secondary links do not compete with the primary actions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
